---
title: "Ongoing Fundings"
format: html
---

- Starting package Chloé Techens
- ANR KAYO (Leading group) : Microrheology of venous blood clots for the diagnosis of hypercoagulability
- Premyom (partner) : Prise en charge et Ralentissement de l'Epidémie de MYopie par l'Optique Médicale (premyom.com)
- ANR ROSALY (partner) : Development of an in vitro vascular platform to study the patient-specific mechanobiological behaviour of human primary cells
- ANR MICHOCO (parner) : Molar-incisor hypomineralization: treatment decision assisted by optical coherence tomography
